requirement_topic.en: RETIE Mandatory Electrical Safety — Heat Pumps and Air-Conditioning Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: RETIE强制电气安全——热泵与空调设备
requirement_topic.zht: RETIE強制電氣安全——熱泵與空調設備

summary.en: Colombia's Reglamento Técnico de Instalaciones Eléctricas (RETIE), administered by the Ministry of Mines and Energy and enforced by SIC (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio), is a mandatory technical regulation covering electrical installations and connected equipment including heat pumps and air-conditioning appliances. Products must comply with the applicable NTC standards (which harmonise IEC standards, including IEC 60335-2-40 for heat pumps and air conditioners) and must be certified by an ONAC-accredited conformity assessment body before sale or installation in Colombia. Importers must present a certificate of conformity issued by an ONAC-accredited laboratory or certification body. China's CCC certificate is not recognised under RETIE.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚《电气安装技术规程》（RETIE）由矿业和能源部主管、SIC（工业和商业监督局）执行，是覆盖电气安装及连接设备（包括热泵和空调电器）的强制性技术法规。产品须符合适用的NTC标准（与IEC标准协调，包括适用于热泵和空调器的IEC 60335-2-40），并须在哥伦比亚销售或安装前取得ONAC认可的符合性评定机构颁发的证书。进口商须提交ONAC认可实验室或认证机构出具的符合性证书。中国CCC证书在RETIE下不被认可。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞《電氣安裝技術規程》（RETIE）由礦業和能源部主管、SIC（工業和商業監督局）執行，是涵蓋電氣安裝及連接設備（包括熱泵和空調電器）的強制性技術法規。產品須符合適用的NTC標準（與IEC標準協調，包括適用於熱泵和空調器的IEC 60335-2-40），並須在哥倫比亞銷售或安裝前取得ONAC認可的符合性評定機構頒發的證書。進口商須提交ONAC認可實驗室或認證機構出具的符合性證書。中國CCC證書在RETIE下不被認可。

standards_or_laws: RETIE — Reglamento Técnico de Instalaciones Eléctricas (Colombia, Ministry of Mines and Energy)
NTC-IEC 60335-2-40 (Heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers — harmonised IEC adoption by ICONTEC)
SIC enforcement — Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio
ONAC — Organismo Nacional de Acreditación de Colombia (accreditation body for conformity assessment)

summary.en: China's mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme covers household air conditioners and heat pumps under GB 4706.32 (safety) and GB 4343.1 (EMC). CCC testing uses Chinese GB standards and is conducted at CNCA-designated laboratories. CCC certificates demonstrate compliance for the Chinese domestic market only and are not accepted as evidence of RETIE compliance in Colombia.
summary.zh: 中国强制性CCC认证制度对家用空调器和热泵依据GB 4706.32（安全）和GB 4343.1（电磁兼容）实施管理，测试在CNCA指定实验室进行。CCC证书仅证明对中国国内市场的合规性，不能作为哥伦比亚RETIE合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國強制性CCC認證制度對家用空調器和熱泵依據GB 4706.32（安全）和GB 4343.1（電磁相容）實施管理，測試在CNCA指定實驗室進行。CCC證書僅證明對中國國內市場的合規性，不能作為哥倫比亞RETIE合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers)
GB 25454 (Heat pump water heaters — energy efficiency)

gap.en: Major gap. CCC certification is not recognised in Colombia under RETIE. Chinese exporters must arrange independent re-testing and certification at an ONAC-accredited conformity assessment body against applicable NTC/IEC standards. Additionally, Colombian grid requirements (60 Hz, 220/127 V) differ from Chinese standard (50 Hz, 220 V), meaning Chinese heat pumps built for 50 Hz will require compressor and motor redesign before they can lawfully be placed on the Colombian market — not only certification re-testing.
gap.zh: 存在重大差距。CCC认证在哥伦比亚RETIE下不被认可。中国出口商须在ONAC认可的符合性评定机构依据适用NTC/IEC标准重新安排独立测试和认证。此外，哥伦比亚电网要求（60 Hz、220/127 V）与中国标准（50 Hz、220 V）不同，意味着按50 Hz设计的中国热泵须重新设计压缩机和电机，方可合法进入哥伦比亚市场——而不仅仅是重新认证测试。
gap.zht: 存在重大差距。CCC認證在哥倫比亞RETIE下不被認可。中國出口商須在ONAC認可的符合性評定機構依據適用NTC/IEC標準重新安排獨立測試和認證。此外，哥倫比亞電網要求（60 Hz、220/127 V）與中國標準（50 Hz、220 V）不同，意味著按50 Hz設計的中國熱泵須重新設計壓縮機和電機，方可合法進入哥倫比亞市場——而不僅僅是重新認證測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RETIE compliance and ONAC-accredited certificate required before sale or installation in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic Chinese market under CCC; not equivalent to or recognised by Colombian RETIE

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energía, República de Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — RETIE compliance with ONAC-accredited certification is mandatory; CCC is not recognised; 60 Hz / 127-220 V grid incompatibility requires hardware redesign, not just re-testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——须取得ONAC认可认证的RETIE合规；CCC不被认可；60 Hz / 127-220 V电网不兼容要求硬件重新设计，而非仅重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——須取得ONAC認可認證的RETIE合規；CCC不被認可；60 Hz / 127-220 V電網不相容要求硬體重新設計，而非僅重新測試。
